tasks.title: Check and respond to emails
tasks.subtext: Review the general inbox and respond to customer or internal inquiries first thing in the morning.

tasks.title: Send jobs for the day to technicians
tasks.subtext: Dispatch today's scheduled jobs to the respective techs. Ensure they have the address, customer details, and scope of work.

tasks.title: Pull yesterday's Klicktiv daily report PDF
tasks.subtext: Note: gross revenue, jobs done, company net, estimate pipeline, each tech's job count.

tasks.title: Enter all completed jobs into the Daily P&L sheet
tasks.subtext: One row per job: Date · Address · Tech · Status (DONE) · Gross Total · Parts Cost · Net After Parts · Tech Pay · Payment Method. DONE jobs only — no estimates here.

tasks.title: Check for duplicate addresses in the Klicktiv report
tasks.subtext: Same address under two techs = possible double-billing. Flag to Martin before entering. Do NOT count the same job twice until confirmed.

tasks.title: Verify you are entering GROSS — not net or company split
tasks.subtext: Gross = the full invoice amount the customer paid. Never enter the 50% split as the gross. See Calc Reference tab for the correct formula.

tasks.title: Update status on any PENDING jobs from prior days
tasks.subtext: Completed → DONE + final total. Still in progress → confirm expected date with tech. Cancelled → CANCELLED + reason.

tasks.title: Log all new estimates from yesterday into the Daily Estimates sheet
tasks.subtext: Required fields: Date · Address · Service Description · Dollar Amount · Tech. Must be logged the same day the estimate is given — every time.

tasks.title: Update the status on every open estimate
tasks.subtext: Use only: PENDING · BOOKED · WON · LOST. A blank status makes the estimate invisible to Klicktiv's pipeline tracker.

tasks.title: Confirm Klicktiv pipeline total matches your estimates sheet
tasks.subtext: Pipeline = sum of all PENDING + BOOKED estimates. If they don't match, find the discrepancy before moving on.

tasks.title: Reconcile cash on hand from yesterday
tasks.subtext: Cash from each tech must match Klicktiv's 'Cash On Hand' figure. Any gap → contact the tech before close of business.

tasks.title: Review all PARTIAL jobs — confirm deposit matches Klicktiv
tasks.subtext: Partials need: deposit amount + full job total + a confirmed completion date. Never leave a partial without a close date.

tasks.title: Log any refunds issued
tasks.subtext: Refunds go in the P&L as a negative line item. Record the original job date, reason, and tech.

tasks.title: Confirm every job has a status in Klicktiv
tasks.subtext: Every job must show FULL, PARTIAL, or CANCELLED before the day closes. A job with no status leaves the P&L incomplete.

tasks.title: Check review count for the day
tasks.subtext: If count is 0 → send a reminder to all techs right now. Target: at least 1 review per 5 jobs. Klicktiv tracks this monthly — it affects the business score.

tasks.title: Confirm all parts costs are entered in Klicktiv
tasks.subtext: Parts must be in before close. Missing parts = inflated net = wrong tech payouts.

tasks.title: Prepare tech payout summaries for Martin's approval
tasks.subtext: Confirm each tech's rate before calculating. Flag any rate that differs from the agreement. Martin must approve before any payment is sent.

tasks.title: Send daily summary to Martin
tasks.subtext: Include: gross revenue · jobs done · company net · pipeline total · any flags or errors. One message, every day, before 8pm.

tasks.title: Confirm tomorrow's booked jobs are in Klicktiv
tasks.subtext: Each booked job needs: address + tech assigned + estimated value. Deposits already collected must be logged.

tasks.title: Every completed job must be in the Daily P&L by 9am the next morning
tasks.subtext: Klicktiv is the source of truth. The Excel P&L must mirror it exactly. There is currently a backlog of 4+ months of missing entries.

tasks.title: DONE jobs must always have a dollar total — never leave blank
tasks.subtext: A DONE status with no total breaks the P&L formula. If the final amount is unconfirmed, mark PENDING until resolved.

tasks.title: Enter GROSS — the full invoice amount, never the split
tasks.subtext: The most common error is entering the 50% company split as the gross. Gross is always the number on the customer's receipt.

tasks.title: Estimates go in the Daily Estimates sheet — never in the P&L
tasks.subtext: Estimates in the P&L are invisible to Klicktiv's pipeline. An estimate only moves to P&L when the job is completed.

tasks.title: Every estimate needs both a dollar amount AND a status
tasks.subtext: Missing amount = invisible to pipeline. Missing status = Klicktiv can't track conversion. Both required, every estimate.

tasks.title: Parts costs must be entered before tech pay is calculated
tasks.subtext: Formula: Net = (Gross − Parts) × company %. If parts are missing, net is overstated and the tech payout will be wrong.

tasks.title: Tampa area
tasks.subtext: Tampa · Brandon · Riverview · Seffner · Land O' Lakes · Lutz · Wesley Chapel · Wimauma · Lithia · Plant City · Zephyrhills · Odessa · Valrico · Lakeland · Polk City · Apollo Beach

tasks.title: St. Pete area
tasks.subtext: St. Petersburg · Clearwater · Dunedin · Palm Harbor · Largo · Pinellas Park · Seminole · Safety Harbor · Holiday · Hudson · New Port Richey · Port Richey

tasks.title: Sarasota area
tasks.subtext: Sarasota · Venice · Nokomis · Bradenton · North Port · Englewood · Palmetto · Lakewood Ranch

tasks.title: Naples area
tasks.subtext: Naples · Fort Myers · Cape Coral · Marco Island · Port Charlotte · Punta Gorda · Estero · Bonita Springs

tasks.title: Miami / Palm Beach area
tasks.subtext: Miami · Weston · Boynton Beach · Palm Beach Gardens · Tamarac · Boca Raton · Fort Lauderdale · Coral Springs

tasks.title: Other areas
tasks.subtext: Orlando · Kissimmee · Winter Garden · Windermere · DeBary · Longwood · Ocala · Brooksville · Spring Hill · Hudson · Lake Suzy

tasks.title: GROSS = the full amount on the customer's invoice
tasks.subtext: Before any deductions. Not the tech's share. Not the company share. Not the net. If the customer paid $1,799, gross = $1,799.

tasks.title: NET AFTER PARTS = Gross minus the cost of materials used
tasks.subtext: If no parts → Net After Parts = Gross. If parts were used → subtract them first. Example: $1,799 gross − $50 parts = $1,749 net after parts.

tasks.title: COMPANY NET = Net After Parts × the company's percentage
tasks.subtext: The split always applies to Net After Parts, not Gross. Example (50%): $1,749 × 50% = $874.50.

tasks.title: Sub / 3 Bros gross and net not swapped
tasks.subtext: Most frequent error: entering $874.50 (the 50% split) as the gross instead of $1,799.

tasks.title: All of each tech's jobs included — not just one
tasks.subtext: When a tech has multiple jobs in a day, every job must be summed.

tasks.title: 3 Bros - DAD is 50% rate, not 75%
tasks.subtext: 3 Bros - DAD is always 50/50. Only Tamir and Shalom are on 75% company.

tasks.title: 3 Bros - SUB gross includes all jobs for the day
tasks.subtext: Count jobs in Klicktiv and confirm all are included. A single missed job can leave the daily gross short by hundreds of dollars.

tasks.title: No duplicate jobs from the same address
tasks.subtext: If the same address appears under two techs, confirm with Martin before counting it twice. Split-commission jobs sometimes appear twice in Klicktiv.

tasks.title: Daily Gross & Net sheet — correct column assignment
tasks.subtext: Col A–C: Sub (50%) · Col E–G: 3 Bros SUB + DAD combined (50%) · Col I–K: Tamir (75% co). Enter date, gross, and calculated net in the right group.

tasks.title: Run the weekly location report
tasks.subtext: Group last week's jobs by: Tampa · St. Pete · Sarasota · Naples · Miami-Palm Beach · Other. For each area: jobs done, gross, parts, net, tech pay. Send to Martin.

tasks.title: Review all PENDING estimates older than 7 days
tasks.subtext: Follow-up call required or change to LOST. Stale estimates inflate the Klicktiv pipeline and mislead revenue planning.

tasks.title: Prepare weekly tech payout summaries for Martin
tasks.subtext: Per tech: jobs done · total gross · parts deducted · net after parts · rate · payout amount · cash on hand. Martin must approve before any payment is made.

tasks.title: Spot-check 5 prior-week P&L entries against Klicktiv
tasks.subtext: Pick 5 random jobs. Open the Klicktiv PDF for that day. Confirm gross, parts, net, and tech pay all match the Excel P&L exactly. Flag any discrepancy to Martin.

tasks.title: Check review coverage rate for the week
tasks.subtext: Jobs done vs reviews collected. If below 20%, escalate to Martin and remind all techs at the Monday morning briefing.

tasks.title: Reconcile all PARTIAL jobs from the week
tasks.subtext: Any job still PARTIAL on Friday must have a confirmed completion date before the weekend. No partials without a close date.

tasks.title: Confirm next week's booked jobs are in Klicktiv
tasks.subtext: Each booked job: address + tech assigned + estimated value. Deposits already collected must be logged.

tasks.title: Send the weekly summary to Martin
tasks.subtext: Weekly gross · jobs done · company net · best area · review count · open pipeline · unresolved flags from the week.

tasks.title: Prepare Monthly Revenue Report
tasks.subtext: Summarize total gross revenue, net revenue, and parts cost for the entire month. Submit to Martin.

tasks.title: Monthly Technician Payout Reconciliation
tasks.subtext: Verify that all weekly payouts match the final monthly totals. Flag any over/under payments.

tasks.title: Review overall business score and review counts
tasks.subtext: Calculate the average review count ratio (target 1 per 5 jobs) across all completed jobs for the month.

tasks.title: Enter Jan 10 – present into the Daily P&L
tasks.subtext: P&L stops at Jan 9, 2026. 700+ completed jobs are missing. Work forward from Jan 10 using daily Klicktiv PDFs as the source, one day at a time.

tasks.title: Add a status to all 12 carry-over estimates (Dec/Jan)
tasks.subtext: Every estimate in the Daily Estimates sheet has no status. Each needs PENDING · WON · LOST · or BOOKED. These are distorting the Klicktiv pipeline total.

tasks.title: Add dollar amount: 99 Spring Ave, Anna Maria (Shalom, Jan 5)
tasks.subtext: This estimate has no dollar amount. Ask Shalom what price was quoted and enter it. No amount = invisible to Klicktiv.

tasks.title: Move 16 estimates from the P&L sheet → Daily Estimates sheet
tasks.subtext: 16 rows with ESTIMATE status are inside the Daily P&L. Must be moved to Daily Estimates so Klicktiv includes them in pipeline tracking.

tasks.title: Close: 8857 CypressHammock Dr (Yotam, Jan 5)
tasks.subtext: Total $1,620 · Deposit $300 · Status still PENDING. Confirm with Yotam — if completed, update to DONE and enter $1,620 total.

tasks.title: Close: 12833 Poinsettia Ave, Seminole (Sub, Jan 7)
tasks.subtext: Total $6,100 · Deposit $3,050 · Status still PENDING. Confirm with Sub team — if completed, DONE + $6,100 total.

tasks.title: Resolve duplicate address — 6720 Pine Springs Dr, Wesley Chapel
tasks.subtext: Appeared under both Tamir (25%) and 3 Bros-DAD (50%) on May 20. Confirm with Martin: one job with a split, or two separate jobs? Do not count twice until resolved.

tasks.title: Confirm Tamir's current commission rate
tasks.subtext: April 2026: Tamir was 50/50. May 2026 shows 75% Co / 25% Tech. Clarify which rate applies going forward so all payouts are calculated correctly.

tasks.title: Set up daily estimate reporting process with all techs
tasks.subtext: Every tech must report estimates the same day. Create a simple WhatsApp template: address + service description + dollar amount. This keeps the Klicktiv pipeline accurate in real time.

commissionRates.note: ⚠ Changed from 50/50 in April — confirm current rate with Martin

formulas.equation: Net After Parts = Gross − Parts Cost
